user_query: I completely forgot about souvenirs. Add a stop at Roots or the Hudson's Bay flagship on Day 10 morning before the CN Tower. I need to grab gifts before I fly out.

fields.name: Souvenir Shopping — Hudson's Bay Flagship / Roots
fields.description: Morning gift shopping at the Hudson's Bay flagship (or nearby Roots store) to pick up souvenirs and last-minute gifts before the CN Tower visit and departure. Mix of Canadian-themed gifts, apparel, and small keepsakes.

insertion_point.reasoning: User requested a morning souvenir stop before the CN Tower. Inserting at position 1 places shopping after the hotel breakfast (ends 8:15 AM) and before the CN Tower at 10:00 AM, allowing time to shop and travel.
